name: TensorPM v1.8.9-beta.3 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.8.9-beta.3

## Bug Fixes

### App failed to start in v1.8.9-beta.2

v1.8.9-beta.2 crashed on launch with an "Uncaught Exception" module error and
has been pulled from distribution.

**What Changed:**

- Fixed a missing file extension in an internal import that made the packaged
  app fail to load (`ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND`)
- Fixed the build verification step so it reliably catches this class of error
  before a release ships

**User Benefit:**
The app starts again. All changes from v1.8.9-beta.2 (GitHub Copilot fix and
~30% smaller download) are included in this release.

## Notes

- If you installed v1.8.9-beta.2 and the app does not start, install this
  version over it — no data is affected.

---

## Release Info

- **Version**: 1.8.9-beta.3
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-08
- **Previous Version**: 1.8.9-beta.2 (pulled)
- **Type**: Patch (Beta) Release
